title: Sentence: Support Retreat from Couveunge Forest
overview: Penal hero Xylo gets an unwelcome helper during an assignment to supporting the main army's retreat.

title: Sentence: Spearhead the Recapture of the Zewan Gan Tunnels 1
overview: A convicted goddess killer is condemned to a cycle of eternal punishment of battling hordes of enemies.

title: Sentence: Spearhead the Recapture of the Zewan Gan Tunnels 2
overview: Xylo's party embarks on a suicide mission to save a group of miners trapped in the tunnels.

title: Standby Order: Mureed Fortress
overview: The heroes' time off at a city festival is actually a prelude to a coming terror.

title: Sentence: Defense Against Corruption at Mureed Fortress 1
overview: A motley crew assembles for the defense of Mureed Fortress.

title: Sentence: Defense Against Corruption at Mureed Fortress 2
overview: As hope seems to slip away, Teoritta and Xylo make a do-or-die gambit against Demon Lord Iblis.

title: Sentence: Feigned Day Off at Port City Ioff
overview: What appears to be the heroes' first true day off turns into a job protecting Teoritta from assassins.

title: Sentence: Undercover Investigation in District of Sodrick 1
overview: To investigate the would-be assassins, an unexpected duo goes undercover in the Adventurers Guild.

title: Sentence: Undercover Investigation in District of Sodrick 2
overview: The chaos in Sodrick's Shell continues to spiral as Lideo Sodrick's fate hangs in the balance.

title: Sentence: Aid In Evacuation of Ioff Cheg Port 1
overview: A new comrade joins the heroes' forces as they take on a faerie invasion in the heart of the city.

title: Sentence: Aid In Evacuation of Ioff Cheg Port 2
overview: Xylo and Teoritta make a charge for Tua Jia tower while Kivia pursues a mystery of her own.

title: Sentence: Aid In Evacuation of Ioff Cheg Port 3
overview: In the aftermath of the battle, revelations are made, and Kivia faces a haunting decision.
